ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer disputes unknown $15 service adjustment fee. Agent identifies it as an error and applies credit for next billing cycle.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: I want to dispute a charge on my bill.
Agent: I'd be happy to help. Which charge are you referring to?
Customer: There's a $15 fee labeled 'service adjustment' that I don't recognize.
Agent: Let me look into that. It appears this was an error. I'll remove it.
Customer: Thank you. How long until I see the credit?
Agent: The credit will appear on your next billing cycle.
